front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — plugin self-development (Markdown skill extension + stdlib structural tests). The pipeline being authored PRODUCES specs/docs; it does not itself run a frontend/backend at build time.

scenarios: scope is classified and branches the flow
acceptance_criteria: Stage 0 names frontend-only/backend-only/both and branches downstream stages
Stage 1 enumerates every persona + an application classification; reads ancillary_docs

scenarios: PERSONA_MAP.md carries one objective section per persona
acceptance_criteria: PERSONA_MAP.md: a section per persona with role/industry/objectives

entries.spec_requirement_id: exploration-pipeline/Stage 3a — page/element catalog with attributes and dynamic/static
scenarios: every element is catalogued with attributes + classification
acceptance_criteria: catalog: every page -> every element {type, html_attributes, value_class}; dynamic/static via dynamic-value-discovery

entries.spec_requirement_id: exploration-pipeline/Stage 3b — route maps mapped to impacted personas
scenarios: every route maps to its impacted personas
acceptance_criteria: each ROUTE_MAP route annotated with impacted personas

scenarios: components cover 100% of elements with placement + payload
acceptance_criteria: COMPONENT_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md maps 100% of elements to components; per-page placement + payload consumption; uses configured language+libs

entries.spec_requirement_id: exploration-pipeline/Stage 4 — conversion to OpenSpec via the openspec skill
scenarios: OpenSpec is produced via the openspec skill and covers 100%
acceptance_criteria: Stage 4 invokes the openspec skill; coverage check confirms 100% conversion

scenarios: every data-bearing element has an identified return source
acceptance_criteria: API_RETURNS_MAP.md: per-page return shapes; every dynamic element -> a return field; over-fetch check flags unconsumed fields

entries.spec_requirement_id: exploration-pipeline/Stage 6 — consolidated API design with play-test (API_DESIGN_MAP.md)
scenarios: consolidated API covers every page and is play-tested
acceptance_criteria: API_DESIGN_MAP.md: consolidated endpoints + CRUD + return-by-user-type; per-page desk-trace play-test covers 100% of pages

entries.spec_requirement_id: exploration-pipeline/Stage 7 — backend data architecture + phenotype gates (DATA_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md)
scenarios: data architecture is derived and phenotype gates fire
acceptance_criteria: DATA_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md: extensible schema + DB types + use cases; phenotype gates for user-mgmt/ai-mgmt/config-OpenTofu; OpenSpec via the openspec skill

scenarios: each stage names its ralph-loop wrapping + exit criterion
acceptance_criteria: each of the 7 stages states its convergence runs inside ralph-loop:ralph-loop with an explicit all-agree/100% exit

scenarios: the naming standard is canonical and documented
acceptance_criteria: 5 *_MAP.md names+paths+frontmatter documented as the standard; auto-gen trigger stated; canonicalized in common-pipeline-conventions

entries.spec_requirement_id: exploration-pipeline/Run-time inputs declared in the brief/config
scenarios: inputs are read from the brief, absence escalates
acceptance_criteria: language/component_libraries/ancillary_docs read from brief/config; absence escalates via domain-gate

entries.spec_requirement_id: exploration-pipeline/Structural tests, subset preservation, and release
scenarios: tests pass and the subset is preserved
acceptance_criteria: new structural tests pass; pre-existing visual-to-api-design tests + command still pass; version bumped; docs current
